name: Capital O 2018 Ring Road Guest House Syariah

reviews.originalComment:
Kamar bersih dan luas
Cuma kalau bisa handuk nya sudah bisa di ganti soalnya tipis dan warnanya sudah tidak putih lagi. 
Lokasi strategis
reviews.reviewComments: The room is clean and spacious. It's just that it would be good if the towels could be replaced because they are thin and no longer white. Strategic location.

reviews.reviewPositives:
Nothing and never like it. 
It was a fraud..Avoid OYO if you can.

I suggest you to cancel directly if the contact for this property is  +62 817 788016.. this number always off and never answer our questions through chat or email..

they didn’t charge us before our stay as promised, but charged after that as they said, we never show up at the property. They are cheaters. The truth was, we showed up, but there were no rooms for us and they didn’t give us our rooms.

I arrived at night at this property, and all the rooms were full. They said they didn’t accept my booking, but the status was confirmed at this application. You know, I was anxious as I booked 18 rooms for 36 people.

So, I asked the responsibilities of the property to search the accommodation for us that night. They searched everywhere and found an empty training centre for us. Okay, that’s enough for that night, as long as I didn’t abandon 36 people on the street. I appreciated the manager and receptionists
 of this accommodation that night for their efforts to help us found the other accommodation.

But, I will avoid OYO all my life. No more..

For booking.com: please block this kind of troublesome partners, so we customers will feel safe to book hotels through your application.

reviews.originalComment: harganya murah tapi dapat kualitas hotel yang bagus, dekat dengan kota dan masjid raya. kamar mandi bersih dan staff nya ramah
reviews.reviewComments: The price is cheap but you get good hotel quality, close to the city and the great mosque. The bathroom is clean and the staff is friendly.

reviews.originalComment: Tempatnya nyaman, bersih, tempatnya strategis, banyak warung jualan makanan dan minuman di dekat penginapan
reviews.reviewComments: The place is comfortable, clean, conveniently located, and there are many food and drink stalls near the accommodation.

reviews.originalComment: Tempat sangat nyaman, kamar ukuran luas, sangat bagus harga juga sangat terjangkau, mudah cari makan di sekitar
reviews.reviewComments: Very comfortable place, spacious room, very nice, the price is also very affordable, easy to find food around.

reviews.reviewNegatives: Einfach nur ekelhaft. Alles verdreckt und die Bilder haben mit der Realität nichts zu tun. Toilettenpapier Fehlanzeige. Kein Deckel auf dem Spülkasten der Toilette. Das Bad sah aus, als hätte es niemals jemand zuvor geputzt und der Druck im Zimmer wurde auch nicht beseitigt. Essensreste auf dem Fußboden etc

reviews.originalComment: Tempat penginapa sangat rekomendasi. Tempat bersih dan luas pelayanan ramah. Kamar bagus fasilitas oke
reviews.reviewComments: The accommodation is highly recommended. The place is clean and spacious with friendly service. The room is nice and the facilities are good.

reviews.originalComment: I have been stay in 3 days, staff so welcoming, and the room was clean and comfortable
reviews.reviewComments: I have been staying for 3 days, the staff was very welcoming, and the room was clean and comfortable.

reviews.originalComment: Walaupun TV tak berfungsi dan tak ada tisu, tapi secara fasilitas yang ada sudah cukup baik. Banyak makanan murah di dekat hotel ini.
reviews.reviewComments: Although the TV doesn't work and there are no tissues, the available facilities are already quite good. There is a lot of inexpensive food near this hotel.

reviews.originalComment: Setiap dinas ke banda aceh nginapnya disini, harga murah tp kualitasnya ga murahan, kamar bersih, AC nya nyala, thank yaa
reviews.reviewComments: Every trip to Banda Aceh stays here, the price is cheap but the quality is not cheap, the rooms are clean, the AC is on, thank you.

reviews.originalComment: Rekomendasi buat para wisatawan buat nginap di sini, pelayanan baik dan sopan.  Kamarnya dilengkapi tv, wifi , ac dan dapat 2 air mineral kemasan. Kalo mau nambah air minum, ada disediain air galon dispenser di luar kamar. Kamar mandi oke juga. Trus ada deposit 100 pas check in dan bakal dikembalikan pas check out. Secara keseluruhan Oke 👌
reviews.reviewComments: Recommendations for tourists to stay here, the service is good and polite. The rooms are equipped with a TV, wifi, air conditioning, and come with 2 bottled waters. If you want to add more drinking water, there is a gallon dispenser available outside the room. The bathroom is also okay. There is a 100 deposit upon check-in which will be refunded at check-out. Overall, it's good 👌.

reviews.reviewPositives: Kamarnya luas, bersih, dan kamar mandinya bersih
reviews.reviewNegatives: Menu makanannua terlalu minim, harus ditambah lagi.

reviews.originalComment: Jadi tempat favorite kalau mau nginap di daerah banda Aceh. Merekomendasikan juga ke beberapa kerabat. Harga bersahabat, kualitas luar biasa
reviews.reviewComments: So it's a favorite place to stay in the Banda Aceh area. I also recommend it to several relatives. The price is friendly, and the quality is outstanding.

reviews.reviewTitle: Improve the service further, ensure the bathroom is not slippery, and always keep it clean.
reviews.originalTitle: Tingkatkan lagi pelayanan nya, kamar mandi diusahakan jgn licin, selalu dibersihkan dgn bersih
reviews.originalComment: Utamakan toilet nya jgn sampai licin
reviews.reviewComments: Prioritize the toilet so that it doesn’t become slippery.

reviews.originalComment: Kmr nya bersih dgn harga yg sangat tersangka.. awalnya ragu2 mu mesin krn bc ulasan yg krg baik.tp alhamdulillah ternyata emg ga ada kendala saat chek in.mksih agoda.....
reviews.reviewComments: The room is clean with a very suspicious price.. at first I was hesitant about the machine because of the not-so-good reviews. But thank God, there were indeed no issues during check-in. Thank you, Agoda.....

reviews.originalComment: Klo booking via app cm dpt handuk aja beda dgn booking lgsg d tempat.. tp overall hotel ny sangat bgs dgn hrga sgtu,bersih, tmpt ny strategis, bnyk cafe,warung dll yg memudahkan kita klo pengen sesuatu skitar hotel bnyk org jualan mcm".
reviews.reviewComments: When booking via the app, you only get towels, which is different from booking directly at the place. But overall, the hotel is very good for that price, clean, in a strategic location, with many cafes, stalls, etc. that make it easy for us if we want something since there are many vendors selling various things around the hotel.

reviews.reviewTitle: Excellent for Family and Budget travelers
reviews.reviewComments:
A relatively new hotel with basic facilities and the need to improve on cleanliness..
Good location, prompt service, spacious room, and most definitely value for money..

Good for a short stay.
However, please be mindful while finding the hotel as the driver/ojek/supir tend to confuse it with the other branch/outlet. 

Deposit varies (IDR45,000 - IDR100,000) depending of your length of stay.

Overall saya senang menginap di sini. Staf ramah dan cepat membantu, kamar bersih tapi lantainya licin jika kena air. Saya rasa itu karena teknik mengepel yg salah.

Paling utama yg harus diperhatikan pengelola penginapan: Pemeliharaan sarana dan fasilitas. Ada beberapa item yg rusak tp tidak disiasati. Sekadar saran, mungkin perlu pengecekan berkala utk barang2 elektronik, contohnya heater air kamar mandi. Saya sempat takut mandi krna terasa ada sedikit setruman yg mengalir bersama air, sampai akhirnya colokan heater saya cabut, tentu dgn memberi tahu staf hotel terlebih dahulu.

Saran lagi, pengelola harus paham bahwa kenyamanan adalah hal utama yg dicari banyak orang selain harga yg terjangkau. Kalau penginapan tdk mampu menyediakan kenyamanan seperti ruangan yang bersih dan harum, kamar mandi yg bersih, bisa kalah saing dgn penginapan lain. 

Saya sendiri mahfum jika penginapan dgn harga amat terjangkau ini tidak menyediakan paket sabun. Tp jika dgn harga yg murah kenyamanan tamu pun dilelang, kemungkinan besar pelanggan bisa lari.

Terima kasih atas kesempatannya, semoga ke depan lebih baik lagi.

reviews.originalComment: Penginapan berada di tempat strategis utk fasilitas kamar ok hanya saja handuk tdk tersedia. Ketikadi minta hanya 1 yg di kasih. Yg lainnya ok
reviews.reviewComments: The accommodation is located in a strategic place, the room facilities are okay, but towels are not available. When asked, only one was given. The rest is okay.

reviews.reviewTitle: Worst hotel experience. The air conditioner was not cooling at all, making the room very uncomfortable. On top of that,

reviews.originalComment: Sya sudah 3* menginap dsni dan sangat suka disini.. Cm hlman parkir sja sempit. Kl kluar mlm hrs cpt2 balek takot parkir full.... Tp yg lain sudah ok... Cm itu sj sih
reviews.reviewComments: I have stayed here 3 times and I really like it here.. It's just that the parking space is tight. If you go out at night, you have to come back quickly because I'm afraid the parking will be full.... But everything else is fine... It's just that.

reviews.reviewNegatives:
The hotel staff just not feel.they made a mistake.
I will.not using hotel afiliate with OYO management anymore.
First and last.
Bad coordination between themself.
Hotel fully book and they don't give us anything except they want to refund our money.
Luckily i had friend that we can stay overnight. Otherwise we will.sleep.on the road.

reviews.reviewComments: Kamarnya lumayan luas

reviews.reviewPositives: Nothing special about this hotel. Oyo always use a bad bed sheet, poor pillow and so on. Not recommded !!

reviews.reviewComments: The shower handle is electrified. I think it's need to be fix

reviews.reviewNegatives:
Scruffy, dirty hotel that's not well looked after. Room and bathroom wasn't that clean - there was hair in the sink and the soap packets from the previous guests were still there. 
Bed sheets that don't fit the bed. 
Waited 20 mins for someone to come to reception in the morning.

reviews.reviewTitle: Need close monitoring and makesure the readiness of the facility

I got standard room with price 135k. Overall it's value for money. However this you need to know. My room design is not a common hotel room design. Bed is near door, and bathroom is near windows. Most of other hotel room is vice versa. My room is not clean enough when I arrived but staff help to clean it after I complain. Staff are nice, hot water works, AC is working well.

reviews.reviewTitle: Hotel terburuk yang pernah saya singgahi
reviews.reviewComments:
Saya pesan dari aplikasi agoda,
Di aplikasi agoda ada promo dan kami bayarlah ke indomaret..
sampailah waktu kami check in di hotel ringroad ini dan kami sangat capek sekali tleh malah ada masalah pihak hotel bilang kalau promosi di agoda atau oyo tidak berlaku jadi kami harus bayar tambahan lagi ..
Dan kami konfirmasi lah ke si ayu sang manager tapi gk ada jalan keluar malah dengan gampangnya dia bilang “cari aja hotel lain” astagfirullah cuman bisa ngelus dada aja gimana mau cari sementara kami sudah bayar dari indomaret dan gk bisa di refund juga..
Pengalaman terburuk nginap di hotel ini dan sangat tidak rekomendasi !!
Lantai licin...aplg kalau kenak air .makin licin dan kengket
Fasilitas lumayan bagus, cuma kebersihan kamar mandi sangat kurang.. Noda noda kerak air.. Tanpa air minum, sabun dll.. Bawa sendiri
Kamar bagus tapi ad tikus hhhh
Kamar Bersih, kmar mandi juga bersih… Tp waterheat nya gak keluar itu aja kekurangannya
Bagus
Ga nyesel si nginap disini, tapi sedikit masukan untuk staff agar lebih ramah🤭👍👍

Kamar mandinya kotor, kamarnya juga jarang dibersihkan
Saya tidak merekomendasikan hotel ini👎

reviews.reviewTitle: Kotor x kamar a gk pernah di bersihin jng nginap disini.. Pesandoubel bat diksh twin bat kamar jorok
reviews.reviewComments: Pokok a oyo paling rusak se kota banda aceh
Kamar luas...tempat tidur nyaman..cuma airnya kecil dan waktu dihidupin di awal berlumpur (mungkin lagi ada gangguan)

Datang sekitar pukul 12 siang.. iyaa ngerti klo check in itu 14.00, cuma posisinya anak udh kecapekan mau tidur butuh kasur.. Tanya lah ke resepsionis apa bisa early check in.. dikata nya kena cas 100ribu.. 
Padahal kondisi hotel sedang kosong, balik lagi aja bu jam setengah 2..
Pada akhirnya kami g balik, cari hotel lain yg ternyata nerima kami walau belum jam 14.00..

Resepsionis (Anak owner ) yg arogan dan tidak ada etika. 
Serta aturan hotel yg tidak jelas sebagaimana mestinya!

Reseptionis (anak owner)  yg arogan dan tidak ada ETIKA kurang ajar 
Dan Aturan yg tidakjelas membuat wisatawan bingung terhadap hotel ini. 
Menyesal telah merekomendasikan hotel ini dahulu.. hotel dgn aturan yg gak jelas, anak owner yg tempramen.
Bagus dan bangus

Terdapat kerosakan pada pintu tandas dan lantai bilik air tidak begitu sempurna.
Perlu perbaiki
Tidak sejuk, perlu kerap servis dan check keadaan aircond
Perbaiki kebersihan tilam dan tandas
